gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward with a smile, spreading arms wide to embrace the colorful objects on the screen
a person leans slightly forward, looking engagingly at the audience while encouraging them to count with both hands
a tutor brings their hands together in front of them, gently illustrating the joining of two groups with a welcoming motion
a person raises one hand to show three fingers on one side, then two fingers on the other side, while explaining the groups
a tutor steps toward the class, inviting them with outstretched hands to discover the total number of objects together
a person bends slightly forward, using both hands to mimic counting motions while encouraging learners to count the new group
a tutor raises both arms in celebration and nods happily, praising the class for their great work in adding the groups
a person claps their hands together joyfully, then points at the audience with excitement to emphasize their expert progress in addition
